info.title: -c, --qfDefaultConnection=VALUE
info.description:
Connection string for query generation, overrides
config files.

options.name: --makeSelfTest
options.description:
Make integration test for query. Requires xunit.
Overrides config files.

options.name: --generator
options.description:
Generator(s) to use. Will replace generators
specified in config files

options.name: --watch
options.description: Watch for changes in the file or directory

options.name: --keepOpen
options.description: Wait for a keystroke before exiting the console.

options.name: --new
options.description:
create a new QueryFirst query with the specified
name.

options.name: --newConfig
options.description:
create qfconfig.json in the current directory
-r, --newRuntimeConnection create QfRuntimeConnection.cs in the current
directory

options.name: --qfDefaultConnection
options.description:
Connection string for query generation, overrides
config files.
